$comment: BM25-search the code corpus for the operator's direction ($input). find.index outputs the RELATIVE .codeindex path on stdout (because $workspace is absolute and inst.Resolve needs a relative dir); we bind it as idxdir and use it as the search target - resolved by inst.Resolve with no cache key, so it always reflects the corpus just rebuilt. idxdir/q are bound BEFORE the search binding so they render first. pack_refs surfaces the ranked records as the flow's output.
